properties.description: Incrementally captures product catalog changes from Azure Cosmos DB change feed and applies SCD Type 2 updates to dim.dim_product_scd2 in Azure Synapse Analytics. Reads the last processed timestamp from an Azure SQL watermark table, executes a Mapping Data Flow for flatten/SCD2 logic, and updates the watermark after each successful run. Dead-letters malformed documents to Blob Storage and sends failure notifications via a Logic App webhook.

activities.name: LookupWatermark
activities.description: Read the last successfully processed Cosmos DB _ts watermark from the Azure SQL watermark table.

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT ISNULL(last_processed_ts, 0) AS last_processed_ts FROM etl.watermark WHERE pipeline_name = 'incremental_cosmosdb_to_synapse_scd2'

activities.name: SCD2ProductCatalogDataFlow
activities.description: Mapping Data Flow: reads Cosmos DB change feed documents since last watermark, flattens the nested pricing object, applies Alter Row SCD2 logic (insert new, update current, expire old), stages into Synapse using HASH(product_id) distribution, and dead-letters malformed records to Blob Storage.

activities.name: UpdateWatermark
activities.description: Update the watermark table with the max _ts seen in this run, derived from the most recent valid_from timestamp in dim_product_scd2. Uses secureOutput to prevent token from appearing in monitoring logs.

scripts.text: MERGE etl.watermark AS target USING (SELECT 'incremental_cosmosdb_to_synapse_scd2' AS pipeline_name, @newWatermarkTs AS last_processed_ts, GETUTCDATE() AS last_updated) AS source ON target.pipeline_name = source.pipeline_name WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.last_processed_ts = source.last_processed_ts, target.last_updated = source.last_updated WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (pipeline_name, last_processed_ts, last_updated) VALUES (source.pipeline_name, source.last_processed_ts, source.last_updated);

activities.name: NotifyOnDataFlowFailure
activities.description: Send failure alert to the Logic App webhook when the SCD2 data flow fails after all retries.

activities.name: NotifyOnWatermarkUpdateFailure
activities.description: Send failure alert to the Logic App webhook when the watermark update fails, which risks duplicate processing on the next run.

activities.name: NotifyOnLookupFailure
activities.description: Send failure alert to the Logic App webhook when the initial watermark lookup fails.

cosmosDbAccountUri.description: The URI of the Azure Cosmos DB account (e.g. https://<account>.documents.azure.com:443/). Do not hardcode — supply via linked service or pipeline parameter.

cosmosDbDatabaseName.description: Cosmos DB database name containing the products container.

synapseEndpoint.description: Azure Synapse Analytics dedicated SQL pool server endpoint (e.g. <workspace>.sql.azuresynapse.net).

synapseDatabaseName.description: The Synapse dedicated SQL pool database name where dim.dim_product_scd2 resides.

alertWebhookUrl.description: Logic App HTTP trigger URL to receive pipeline failure notifications. Stored as SecureString to prevent logging.

deadLetterContainer.description: Blob Storage container path for dead-lettered malformed documents (missing product_id or categoryId).
